title: Indonesia to procure BrahMos missiles from India: Report
content: In 2023, BrahMos Aerospace, a company jointly owned by the governments of India and Russia, told Reuters it was in advanced discussions with Jakarta on a potential agreement estimated to be worth between $200 million and $350 million. Rico said the agreement was "part of the modernisation of military hardware and defence capabilities, especially in the maritime sector."

title: Trump's China visit to be confined to Beijing amid security concerns: Report
content: US President Donald Trump's upcoming China visit, scheduled from March 31 to April 2, will be limited to Beijing due to a packed schedule and security concerns. While Chinese officials initially considered a multi-city itinerary, time constraints and logistical challenges led to the decision to focus solely on the capital.

title: 'Career was on the line': Gambhir makes huge Samson admission after World Cup glory
content: Head coach Gautam Gambhir lauded Sanju Samson's exceptional performances during India's T20 World Cup victory. Samson's match-winning contributions, especially in the final, showcased his character under pressure. Gambhir highlighted Samson's comeback and impactful innings, emphasizing his special talent and mental strength. This tournament marks a significant beginning for Samson's promising career.

title: ICC shares 'made with Google Gemini' photo of Indian cricket team
content: India has won the T20 World Cup, defeating New Zealand by 96 runs. This marks India's third T20 World title and the first time a team has won on home soil. The victory was celebrated by tech leaders Sundar Pichai and Satya Nadella. India's openers set a record Powerplay score. Jasprit Bumrah's bowling secured the win.

title: 'Shahid Afridi slapped Mohammad Amir': Razzaq's explosive claim
content: A friend's phone repair inadvertently exposed the 2010 spot-fixing plot, revealing messages between a fixer and Pakistan players. Former selector Abdul Razzaq detailed how captain Shahid Afridi confronted young pacer Mohammad Amir, leading to a confession after a slap. This revelation ultimately brought the scandal to light, resulting in bans and jail time for the involved cricketers.

title: Amazon sends letter to FCC - Here's what it read
content: Amazon's Leo has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's ambitious one million-satellite proposal, citing a lack of critical orbital and RF data. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, lacks space safety details, and would take centuries to deploy, potentially monopolizing orbital resources. The filing questions the feasibility and intent behind SpaceX's massive constellation.

title: 2020 Delhi riots case: Court grants 10-day interim bail to Sharjeel Imam
content: A Delhi court has granted Sharjeel Imam 10-day interim bail in a 2020 Delhi riots case, months after the Supreme Court denied him regular bail. The Supreme Court had previously stated that long incarceration alone isn't enough for bail under UAPA, especially in cases affecting public order and national security.

title: Putin congratulates Mojtaba Khamenei on appointment as Iran’s new leader, pledges 'unwavering' support
content: Russia's President Putin has pledged 'unwavering support' to Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, following his father's death in airstrikes. Putin expressed confidence in Mojtaba's ability to unite Iran amidst regional conflict. Reports also suggest Russia is sharing real-time intelligence on US military assets in the Middle East with Tehran, potentially aiding in targeting.

title: Sundar Pichai congratulates Team India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup
content: India achieved a historic T20 World Cup victory, becoming the first nation to defend its title and win on home soil. Their dominant performance against New Zealand, highlighted by exceptional batting and bowling, secured their third T20 World Cup title. Tech leaders Sundar Pichai and Satya Nadella congratulated the team on their remarkable achievement.

title: How this 65-Year-old woman from Patna built Rs 2.5 crore food empire in 5 years
content: Facing initial disapproval, Devni Devi started a tiffin service from her kitchen at 59 to support her family. Despite societal judgment and personal sacrifices, her dedication to providing nutritious home-cooked meals for students led to growing popularity. Her small venture has now blossomed into a successful restaurant with a significant turnover and a loyal customer base.

title: 'Paaji, kade hass vi leya karo': Arshdeep Singh trolls Gautam Gambhir
content: Team India clinched their third T20 World Cup title, defeating New Zealand in a thrilling final. Celebrations erupted as players, including Arshdeep Singh playfully teasing head coach Gautam Gambhir, shared their joy. Captain Suryakumar Yadav highlighted the importance of mental resilience and team understanding in their historic home victory.

title: Where is JD Vance? The curious case of the 'missing' VP during Iran war
content: That tension became particularly visible during the early days of the Iran war, when Washington’s attention shifted to a curious question that began circulating across political circles and newsrooms alike: where exactly was JD Vance?

title: Middle East tensions force IndiGo Delhi–Manchester flight to make U-turn mid-air
content: An IndiGo flight from Delhi to Manchester returned to Delhi shortly after takeoff. This happened due to sudden airspace restrictions. These restrictions are linked to the evolving situation in West Asia. IndiGo is working with authorities to resume the journey. The airline is also informing passengers about potential delays and diversions on other international routes.

title: Did Israel surprise US with strikes on Iran oil depots? White House reportedly sent 'WTF' message
content: The White House expressed surprise and disapproval after Israel struck Iranian oil facilities, a move not anticipated by the Trump administration. Officials feared the attacks could rally Iranians, boost oil prices, and negatively impact global energy markets. While Israel stated the depots supplied the regime, Washington conveyed strong disagreement, with concerns about rising gas prices.

title: Dehradun MCA student couple stab each other during fight over alleged affair
content: A young couple, first-year MCA students, were injured after allegedly stabbing each other in Dehradun. The altercation reportedly stemmed from accusations of infidelity, with both individuals attacking each other with kitchen knives. They are currently hospitalized and out of danger.

title: Justice for Sanju: A true Kerala story
content: Sanju Samson had scored just 46 runs from five matches against New Zealand. In the off chance he earned against Namibia, things didn't get any better. But luck did shine on him after all, and he repaid the backing with absolute tenacity, finishing as the Player of the Tournament and India's highest run-scorer in a T20 World Cup.

title: Dhurandhar 2 OTT release: Platform and streaming date revealed
content: Ranveer Singh’s 'Dhurandhar 2', directed by Aditya Dhar, releases on March 19. The spy thriller will stream later on OTT, with the date yet to be revealed. Advance bookings cross ₹18 crore. The release follows Yash’s Toxic delay, boosting box-office prospects for this highly awaited sequel.

title: Murmu-Mamata row: BJP calls TMC ‘fake news factory’, hits back over insult to President
content: The BJP has labeled the Trinamool Congress a "fake news factory" after West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee accused the BJP and PM Modi of insulting President Droupadi Murmu. Banerjee presented a photo suggesting the PM was seated while the President stood during an award ceremony, contradicting BJP's claims of protocol adherence.

title: ‘Next stop Olympic gold’: Surya sets LA 2028 target after India's T20 WC win
content: Fresh from a historic T20 World Cup victory at home, Indian captain Suryakumar Yadav has declared the next major ambition: Olympic gold at the 2028 Los Angeles Games.  Following a dominant win against New Zealand, Yadav emphasised the team's shift to an aggressive style, building on their 2024 triumph.  He aims to continue this winning momentum for India.

title: Amid Iran war, US ramping up B-21 Raider production: What makes the next-gen bomber stand out
content: The US Air Force will increase production of its new B-21 Raider stealth bomber. This move aims to speed up deliveries and bolster the nation's long-range strike capabilities. The decision comes amid rising global tensions. The advanced bomber is designed for contested environments and will form the core of the future Air Force bomber fleet.

title: Gold price today: How much gold costs in your city today? Check rates
content: Gold futures experienced a significant drop of Rs 1,052 on Monday, closing at Rs 1,60,582 per 10 grams due to weakened local spot demand and soft global cues. Conversely, silver futures saw an advance, gaining Rs 4,362 to end at Rs 2,63,923 per kilogram on the MCX amid market uncertainties.

title: 2026 Hyundai Verna launched at Rs 10.98 lakh: What's new in Virtus, Slavia rival
content: The 2026 Hyundai Verna facelift continues to be offered with two engine options - a 1.5-litre naturally aspirated petrol (115 hp, 144 nm) with a 6-speed manual or a CVT automatic. Another engine option is a 160 hp, 253 nm, 1.5-litre turbo petrol with a 6-speed manual or a 7-speed DCT.

title: Russia’s anthem returns at Winter Paralympics as Varvara Voronchikhina wins gold
content: For the first time in more than a decade, Russia’s national anthem will be played at the Winter Paralympics after para alpine skier Varvara Voronchikhina won a gold medal at the 2026 Winter Paralympics in Milan-Cortina on Monday. The 23-year-old skier finished first in the women’s super-G standing event, marking a historic moment for Russian sport at the Paralympic Games.

title: Eminent historian and former JNU professor KN Panikkar passes away at 89 in Thiruvananthapuram
content: Eminent historian K.N. Panikkar, a leading Marxist scholar and founder chairman of the Kerala Council for Historical Research, passed away at 89 in Thiruvananthapuram. Panikkar, who held significant academic positions at Jawaharlal Nehru University and served as Vice-Chancellor of Sree Sankaracharya Sanskrit University, was also the Chairman of the Kerala Higher Education Council at the time of his death.

title: Shortage of LPG cooking gas in Mumbai, supply of commercial cylinders halted
content: Mumbai is facing a severe LPG cooking gas shortage, with refill waiting times stretching to eight days. Commercial cylinder supply to hotels and restaurants has completely stopped, potentially triggering a crisis for eateries. Panic buying is evident as domestic consumers rush to book refills, while new government regulations limit booking frequency.

title: Nashik bribery case: 2 GST officials among 3 held by Mumbai ACB over Rs 1 crore demand
content: Mumbai ACB arrested a private individual and detained two senior Maharashtra GST officials for allegedly demanding Rs 1.25 crore in bribe from a Nashik businessman. The private person was caught accepting Rs 20 lakh, the first installment, on behalf of the officials to expedite a GST investigation.

title: Jwala delivers 5 cubs at Kuno National Park; India’s cheetah population rises to 53
content: Project Cheetah celebrates a significant milestone as Kuno National Park welcomes five new cheetah cubs, born to Namibian cheetah Jwala. This brings India's cheetah population to 53, with 33 cubs now born on Indian soil. The births signify successful adaptation and a major boost to re-establishing the species, declared extinct in 1952.

title: From pooja to wild celebrations: How India welcomed the T20 World Cup title in Ahmedabad
content: Ahmedabad erupted in joyous celebrations as India clinched the 2026 T20 World Cup title at the Narendra Modi Stadium. Thousands of fans, some without tickets, thronged the venue and surrounding streets, dancing and cheering. Inside the hotel, though, the party was only just getting started.

title: ‘Team Kalki’: How 2 former Tihar inmates built a pan-India darknet drug network
content: The Narcotics Control Bureau has busted a pan-India darknet drug network, "Team Kalki," seizing significant quantities of LSD, MDMA, and liquid MDMA. The operation, led by repeat offenders Anurag Thakur and Vikas Rathi, involved over 1,000 consignments dispatched since January 2025. Investigations are ongoing to uncover the full extent of this online trafficking ring.

title: Parking, garbage & old grudges: How 50-yr feud exploded on Holi in Delhi
content: A minor Holi water splash escalated into a deadly clash between two neighbouring families in Delhi's Uttam Nagar, resulting in one death and multiple injuries. The long-standing feud, fueled by everyday disputes, led to protests and increased police presence in the area.

title: 'I am leaving Pakistan cricket': 24-year-old quits game, alleges corruption
content: A 24-year-old cricketer from Sialkot, Shahzaib Bhatti, has announced his departure from Pakistan cricket, citing politics, corruption, and a lack of structure in the domestic system. Despite playing a crucial role in his team's Quaid-e-Azam Trophy win, Bhatti claims he was sidelined for nearly 40 matches, leading him to abandon his dream of representing Pakistan.

title: Skyrocketing crude prices could push Pakistan's monthly oil import bill to $600 million
content: Pakistan's monthly oil import bill could surge to $600 million as West Asian tensions push global oil prices past $100 a barrel. The government is preparing contingency plans, seeking IMF relief on petroleum levies, and exploring alternate fuel routes. This comes as fuel prices in Pakistan have already risen by approximately 20%, intensifying economic strain and concerns about further inflation.

title: Bahrain's Bapco declares 'force majeure' after Iran strikes: What it means
content: Bahrain's state oil company declared force majeure on shipments after Iranian strikes ignited a fire at its largest oil facility. The attack, which caused material damage but no casualties, escalates regional tensions and disrupts vital energy corridors. This development follows a series of strikes on energy installations amid the widening conflict.

title: ‘Don’t remember any time we had an argument’: Surya on partnership with Gambhir
content: India's T20 World Cup triumph highlights the strong captain-coach bond between Suryakumar Yadav and Gautam Gambhir. Their seamless understanding and shared vision have led to smooth decision-making and minimal selection debates. Yadav also emphasised investing in players during tough times and fostering open communication in the dressing room for sustained success.

title: ‘Stop celebrating milestones’: Gambhir’s strong message after India’s T20 WC triumph
content: India's head coach Gautam Gambhir emphasized that trophies, not individual milestones, are paramount for team success. He highlighted this philosophy after India's T20 World Cup victory, urging a shift in focus from personal records to collective achievements. Gambhir praised Suryakumar Yadav and Sanju Samson for embracing this team-first approach, prioritizing wins over statistics.

title: Jana Nayagan censor row: Vijay’s film faces delay
content: Vijay's highly anticipated final film, 'Jana Nayagan,' faces another setback as its Revising Committee screening was unexpectedly postponed.  Originally slated for March 9, the review was cancelled due to a committee member's illness, leaving the film's certification and release date uncertain.  This delay follows earlier objections regarding religious practices and army symbols.

title: Dolphins to release Tua, take on record cap hit
content: The Dolphins will release quarterback Tua Tagovailoa after the start of the new league year in a move that will leave Miami with an NFL-record $99 million in dead money.

title: Mass soccer brawl in Brazil leads to 23 red cards
content: Cruzeiro's 1-0 win over Atlético-MG in Sunday's Mineiro Championship final was overshadowed by a mass brawl that erupted seconds before the final whistle and resulted in 23 red cards issued.

title: Sources: Ingram back to Texans on 3-year deal
content: Texans guard Ed Ingram will not hit free agency after agreeing to return to Houston on a three-year, $37.5 million deal, according to ESPN and NFL Network.

title: Steelers to bring back CB Samuel, sources say
content: The Steelers are re-signing corner Asante Samuel Jr. to a one-year, $4 million deal, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Sources: Rams reach record deal with McDuffie
content: The Los Angeles Rams and All-Pro cornerback Trent McDuffie reached agreement on a record four-year, $124 million extension that includes $100 million guaranteed, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Sunday night.

title: Raiders trading for Bills CB Johnson, source says
content: The Raiders are sending a sixth-round pick to the Bills in exchange for veteran cornerback Taron Johnson and a seventh-round selection, a source told ESPN.

title: Source: Bengals won't tender backup QB Browning
content: The Cincinnati Bengals are not tendering restricted free agent quarterback Jake Browning, who started 10 games over three seasons in relief of Joe Burrow, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Ngannou to return on MVP's inaugural MMA card
content: Ex-UFC, PFL heavyweight champ Francis Ngannou will return to action on May 16 as part of Jake Paul's Most Valuable Promotions' inaugural MMA fight card headlined by Ronda Rousey vs. Gina Carano.

title: Spartans' Fears gets tech for another groin kick
content: Michigan State point guard Jeremy Fears Jr. received another technical foul for a kick toward a player's groin area.

title: 🔮 Men's Bubble Watch: Iowa's positive outlook
content: Entering the Big Ten tournament, the Hawkeyes remain in good position despite six losses in eight games.

title: Women's Bracketology: Championship Sunday brings clarity to No. 1 seeds, top 16
content: Texas locked up the No. 3 overall seed, Duke moved to a No. 2 and West Virginia should host NCAA tournament games.

title: Did NIL kill the upset? Why power conferences just keep dominating in March
content: Where did all the Cinderella stories who busted our brackets go? Inside why the madness seems to be vanishing.

title: When will Cole return? Is Dominguez a trade candidate? What to expect from six make-or-break Yankees
content: Reinforcements? Trade bait? Some key players won't be on the field in the Bronx on Opening Day. Here's what that means.

title: How Jurickson Profar helped sign his replacement -- and next steps for the Braves
content: In the wake of Profar's suspension, Yastrzemski's signing has become even more important for Atlanta.

title: NBA stars reflect on Wilt Chamberlain's 'mythical' legacy
content: As Gilgeous-Alexander closes in on breaking the longest 20-point scoring streak, NBA stars reflect on Chamberlin's legacy.

title: NHL playoff watch: The Blue Jackets' path to the playoffs
content: Columbus added Conor Garland at the deadline, and remains in the mix. Plus, full playoff projections, draft lottery standings and more.

title: 'LOL THATS IT?': MMA fighters react to UFC White House card
content: The polarizing fight card generated online comments from stars such as Conor McGregor and Sean O'Malley.

title: Predicting the USWNT's starting lineup for next year's World Cup
content: With the 2027 Women's World Cup closer than you think, we look at the USWNT's roster and forecast the 11 players Emma Hayes will count on for the tournament.

title: The pride and power of Iowa State basketball's Audi Crooks
content: Audi Crooks hears the haters. But Iowa State's star inherited resilience from her mom and joy from her dad. Her high-scoring game is the ultimate counterpoint.

title: Australian GP overreactions: Verstappen could quit F1? McLaren on the ropes?
content: After a wild, often polarising Australian Grand Prix weekend, ESPN looks at some of the sweeping generalisations being made about Formula 1 and judges whether they're overblown or not.

title: Premier League giants can't afford to miss Champions League riches for even a season
content: The Champions League is back, but for the biggest clubs it's ever-more important that it never goes away as the price of failure to qualify increases.

title: PSG's wild new Jordan collab jersey is their FIFTH kit of 2025-26
content: The Champions League holders expanded their wardrobe with a kit inspired by the lights of Paris at night.

title: Transfer rumors, news: USMNT defender Robinson wants Liverpool over Man United
content: Fulham and USMNT left back Antonee Robinson favors a move to Liverpool over Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Nainar Nagenthran slams DMK government over law and order
content: He claims that murders, robberies, sexual assaults, and machete attacks had become everyday occurrences in the past five years

title: BJP finalises seat-sharing deal with two regional parties for Assam polls
content: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma says the number of constituencies sought by the Asom Gana Parishad awaits the approval of his party’s Central Parliamentary Board

title: Protocol lapses at President event: Bengal government submits report to Centre
content: State Chief Secretary Nandini Chakraborty sent the report to Union Home Secretary Govind Mohan, along with supporting documents detailing the sequence of events related to the incident

title: Performance grading feature to be introduced in Kerala Local Self-Government department’s K-Smart online service delivery application
content: K-Smart, launched in 2024, is now being used to deliver all major services through local bodies, including building permit applications, trade licences, and birth, death and marriage registration

title: Two AR sub inspectors in Telangana ACB net for taking ₹1 lakh bribe after framing cybercrime victim
content: A cyber fraud victim from Ramanthapur was allegedly framed as accused by the two Cybercrime SIs, who demanded ₹1 lakh to not arrest him

title: ‘Savukku’ Shankar seeks discharge from case on tweets against Palaniswami, Panneerselvam
content: Justice C. Kumarappan directs Chennai Cyber Crime police to file a counter affidavit by April 9, 2026, and stays the proceedings pending before Saidapet Metropolitan Magistrate court till then

title: Kerala CM should explain why police failed to process a distress call from Minister Ganesh Kumar’s wife, asks Satheesan
content: Minister’ wife Bindu Menon accuses him of infidelity and says she "caught the Minister red-handed with a woman at his house at Valakom in Kollam district on Saturday"

title: Two killed in encounter with wild elephant in Nilgiris
content: Forest Department officials stated that based on their preliminary investigations, the encounter seemed to be accidental

title: First phase of Mananchira-Vellimadukunnu road project opened to traffic
content: Public Works Minister P.A. Mohamed Riyas inaugurates Mananchira-Malaparamba stretch and launches work on Malaparamba-Vellimadukunnu reach

title: Opposition to move impeachment motion against CEC Gyanesh Kumar
content: Leaders of INDIA bloc agree to Trinamool Congress’ suggestion to move the motion against the Chief Election Commissioner

title: 70-year-old man dies after car catches fire in Bagepalli
content: Police said the vehicle suddenly caught fire, suspected to have been caused by a short circuit. Within minutes, the flames engulfed the entire car, leaving the driver trapped inside.

title: SC impleads Unnao rape survivor in CBI plea against bail for Sengar
content: Apex court recognises the right of the Unnao rape survivor to be heard in a petition filed by the CBI challenging the grant of bail to the accused former BJP MLA Kuleep Singh Sengar in the case

title: CPI(M) demands single-phase assembly polls in West Bengal
content: The CPI(M) also demanded that all genuine voters be included in the voter list to be published after the completion of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls

title: Daily power consumption in Kerala crosses 100 million unit mark for the first time this summer
content: Power consumption data for State shows consumption of 100.4 mu on Saturday. State is banking heavily on electricity ‘imports’ to meet the summer demand. Of the 100.4 mu consumed on Saturday, 71.64 mu came through imports

title: Bengaluru: Realtor abducted, murdered near Anekal; probe underway
content: Preliminary investigation has revealed that a person identified as Mohan Babu had allegedly given a contract of ₹25 lakh for Gopal’s murder over business rivalry.

title: Telangana DCA introduces SMS system to alert pharmacies about substandard medicines
content: The system is expected to help withdraw such medicines from market before they reach a larger patient population, as per Telangana DCA

title: Eminent historian K.N. Panikkar passes away
content: A distinguished historian of modern India and a prominent defender of secular and critical historiography, K.N. Panikkar leaves behind a legacy that shaped generations of students, scholars and public discourse on history, culture and politics

title: T.N. physiotherapists welcome pay hike, call for benefits and timely payments
content: Thanking the Chief Minister, TN IAP requested that the revised salary be implemented from the current month

title: Rajya Sabha poll: Tiruchi Siva, Thambi Durai, Anbumani among six elected unopposed from Tamil Nadu
content: As the number of valid nominations and the number of Rajya Sabha seats to be filled from Tamil Nadu were the same, all six candidates were declared elected unopposed

title: Bengaluru North division police recover 107 stolen mobile phones worth ₹21.4 lakh
content: Bengaluru City Police officers and staff traced the missing phones using the CEIR system, which helps block and track mobile devices based on their IMEI numbers.

title: Tax law needed teeth to deal with bigwig evaders: Supreme Court
content: Supreme Court was orally responding to a petition challenging non-disclosure of reasons for search and seizure and extension of 'assets' to the digital space

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: AIADMK leader says ‘no information’ amid reports of bid to bring Vijay’s TVK into NDA
content: In Salem on Sunday, AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami observed that Mr. Vijay made welfare announcements for women just as the leader of any other political party would do ahead of elections

title: Ahmedabad Air India crash: Probe report will be out ‘very soon, says Government
content: The Civil Aviation Minister said the Ministry is doing its best to ensure flight operations and to bring back Indians stranded due to West Asia conflict

title: 74,000 deaths: why the HPV vaccine is necessary in India
content: With the government having launched the HPV vaccination drive across the country, here are answers to some frequently asked questions about the virus and the vaccine

title: IndiGo’s Delhi–Manchester flight: a 14-hour journey to nowhere
content: Passengers aboard the Delhi–Manchester flight faced an unexpected 14-hour ordeal as IndiGo cited ‘last-minute airspace restrictions’ linked to the ongoing situation in West Asia

title: Bihar cleric booked over 'objectionable' remarks on Adityanath's mother
content: An FIR was registered against Maulana Abdul Salim based on a complaint filed by district BJP president Ravi Mishra

title: Jaipur-based businessman killed in road accident in Rajasthan's Alwar
content: According to the police, the driver lost control of the car, and it broke through the roadside barricades and crashed into the median before hitting the wall of a culvert

title: Chaos erupts as actor Jr. NTR mobbed by fans during Bengaluru visit, police lathi-charge crowd
content: The actor was in the city to attend the inauguration of KIMS Super Speciality Hospital at Mahadevapura. As news of his arrival spread, thousands of fans rushed to the venue to catch a glimpse of the actor.

title: Kerala’s CPI legislator C.C. Mukundan accuses party leadership of trading seats for election funding
content: Mukundan accuses CPI State leadership of preferring his party compatriot Geetha Gopi to him for Nattika Assembly seat, which he currently represents, as ‘she could raise funds to fill CPI’s election war chest’

title: Parliament Budget Session: BJP slams Opposition walkout during Jaishankar’s statement on West Asia war
content: A senior BJP leader also said that the Opposition parties have no interest in the country’s development, and have been staging walkouts during ministers’ replies on various debates and discussions.

title: Namibian cheetah gives birth to five cubs in Kuno National Park; total count rises to 53
content: In a post on X, Environmental Minister Bhupender Yadav said this marks an important milestone in India’s cheetah conservation journey

title: Rajya Sabha polls: BJP appoints Central observers in Bihar, Haryana, Odisha
content: Maharashtra Minister Chandrasekhar Bawankule will be Central observer for the Rajya Sabha elections in Odisha,” a notification said

title: SIR in W.B.: Supreme Court to consider plea against deletion of electors from electoral rolls
content: “These are electors. They had voted earlier and now their documents have not been taken,” Senior lawyer Maneka Guruswamy said

title: CBI summons Vijay on March 10 for further questioning on Karur stampede
content: “During the probe, the CBI has gathered material that needs further questioning and clarification from the actor,” a CBI officials said

title: Meghalaya CM Sangma condemns Delhi assault, says racial bullying against northeast people not acceptable
content: The physical attack on two of our people from Manipur and Assam near the Saket Court in Delhi is sickening, Mr. Sangma said

title: Kerala private sector nurses’ strike disrupts hospital services; protests in Kozhikode, Kannur
content: Though Kerala government recently revised pay structure of nurses working in private hospitals, United Nurses Association claims that certain hospitals are not willing to implement it

title: Telangana CM inaugurates 250-year-old Bam Rukn-ud-Dowla restored by HYDRAA; wants lake policing for women’s safety
content: Inaugurating the 250-year-old lake, CM Naidu directed officials to take steps towards lake policing and ensure that women who visit the waterbodies do not face issues

title: BJP urges Election Commission to hold West Bengal Assembly election in not more than 3 phases
content: A key concern raised by the BJP delegation related to the deployment and utilisation of nearly 400 companies of central forces currently stationed in the State

title: EV firm Ultraviolette launches battery aimed at sustainable mobility
content: Customers can now own an Ultraviolette X-47 starting at ₹1,49,000, while subscribing to the battery beginning at ₹2499 per month,” said the company.

title: Kerala govt to honour T20 World Cup hero Sanju Samson with civic reception
content: General Education Minister V. Sivankutty says government has communicated the decision to Sanju Samson and is awaiting the cricketer’s nod

title: Class 10 student dies as thatched hut catches fire near Minjur
content: Early Monday morning, the thatched hut suddenly caught fire and the flames spread rapidly. Srinivasan, who was sleeping inside the house, got trapped in the fire

title: Trinamool Congress MPs give notices in Lok Sabha, Rajya Sabha to discuss 'voter disenfranchisement'
content: In the Lok Sabha, senior party leader Saugata Roy has submitted an adjournment motion notice demanding a debate on the issue

title: Watch: From protests to power: RSP’s victory reshapes Nepal politics | The Hindu Editorial
content: Nepal’s March 5 election has delivered a dramatic political upheaval, with the four-year-old Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) securing a commanding mandate. Led by Balendra Shah, the party defeated veteran leaders including K.P. Sharma Oli in a vote driven by youth anger over corruption and instability.

title: A weekend in Jodhpur: Inside Chandelao Garh and the city’s legendary street food trail
content: Stay at an ancestral home-turned-boutique hotel, explore community craft initiatives, and eat your way through jalebis, gulab jamun sabzis and rabri ladoos

title: Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar shown black flags, faces ‘go back’ slogans in Kolkata
content: The full bench of the Election Commission of India (ECI) was at Kalighat to offer their prayers at the Kali temple, which is also close to the residence of Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee

title: Focus on subjects like AI, automation needs to be increased: PM Modi
content: We will have to accelerate the process of linking our education system to the real world economy even further, he said

title: U.S. urged India to buy Russian oil already at sea to ease supply fears: Energy Secretary Chris Wright
content: The move, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said is a short-term, pragmatic effort to stabilise the market and did not signal any change in Washington's policy towards Russia

title: Two accused in Bangladesh’s political leader Osman Hadi’s murder arrested by Bengal STF: official
content: “They were trying to take shelter in the border area of Bongaon with the intention of crossing back into Bangladesh when the opportunity arises,” the statement said

title: Case filed against captain of Panama-registered ship over fishing boat collision off Kerala coast
content: FIR says the trawling boat sank following the accident, causing a loss of about ₹1.5 crore to its owner

title: Schools reopen in Kashmir
content: Schools, colleges and universities were closed for a week from last Monday after protests erupted across the Valley following Khamenei’s killing

title: Swachh Poes: how a gated community in Chennai is promoting the goals of Clean India Mission
content: A resident of Aashiana Apartments at Alwarpet in Chennai, Anita Hegde narrates how volunteer-residents from the gated community are nudging their neighbours on Poes Road and Rajakrishna Road to practise source segregation of waste, keep their neighourhood spic and span and also adopt other sustainability-promoting practices

title: Around 30 students fall ill with diarrhoea at AIIMS-Mangalagiri, 10 under observation
content: According to information from the management, the symptoms began on Thursday (March 6) and Friday (March 7) among undergraduate students.

title: Watch: End of chapter: R.N.Ravi’s posture helped the DMK | The Hindu Editorial

title: Saudi Arabia Starts Reducing Oil Production As Hormuz Closure Fills Storage
content: Saudi Arabia has started reducing oil production as the near-blockage of the critical Strait of Hormuz starts filling storage tanks, according to a person familiar with the matter, even as it rushes to reroute some supplies through the Red Sea.

title: Meta Strengthens AI Efforts With New Engineering Team

title: "We've Lost Contact": Russian Workers Stuck At Iran Nuclear Plant Amid War
content: Russia's state nuclear company, Rosatom, is preparing to evacuate a second group of personnel and family members from Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant. This includes workers involved in constructing Units 2 and 3.
